description: You are a Clinical Data Manager for the Phase II Diabetes Trial (DM-TRIAL-2024). Using OpenClinica (login: root / Admin123!), import the baseline patient data from the CDISC ODM XML file located at /home/ga/import_data.xml into the 'Phase II Diabetes Trial' study. Verify that the data for subject DM-101 has been correctly populated in the 'Demographics Survey' CRF within the 'Baseline Assessment' event.
